speaker: IMOGEN
text: I would thou grew’st unto the shores o’ th’ haven

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And questionedst every sail. If he should write

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And I not have it, ’twere a paper lost

speaker: IMOGEN
text: As offered mercy is. What was the last

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That he spake to thee?

speaker: PISANIO
text: It was his queen, his queen!

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Then waved his handkerchief?

speaker: PISANIO
text: And kissed it, madam.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Senseless linen, happier therein than I.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And that was all?

speaker: PISANIO
text: No, madam. For so long

speaker: PISANIO
text: As he could make me with this eye or ear

speaker: PISANIO
text: Distinguish him from others, he did keep

speaker: PISANIO
text: The deck, with glove or hat or handkerchief

speaker: PISANIO
text: Still waving, as the fits and stirs of ’s mind

speaker: PISANIO
text: Could best express how slow his soul sailed on,

speaker: PISANIO
text: How swift his ship.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Thou shouldst have made him

speaker: IMOGEN
text: As little as a crow, or less, ere left

speaker: IMOGEN
text: To after-eye him.

speaker: PISANIO
text: Madam, so I did.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I would have broke mine eyestrings, cracked them, but

speaker: IMOGEN
text: To look upon him till the diminution

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Of space had pointed him sharp as my needle;

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Nay, followed him till he had melted from

speaker: IMOGEN
text: The smallness of a gnat to air; and then

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Have turned mine eye and wept. But, good Pisanio,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: When shall we hear from him?

speaker: PISANIO
text: Be assured, madam,

speaker: PISANIO
text: With his next vantage.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I did not take my leave of him, but had

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Most pretty things to say. Ere I could tell him

speaker: IMOGEN
text: How I would think on him at certain hours

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Such thoughts and such; or I could make him swear

speaker: IMOGEN
text: The shes of Italy should not betray

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Mine interest and his honor; or have charged him

speaker: IMOGEN
text: At the sixth hour of morn, at noon, at midnight

speaker: IMOGEN
text: T’ encounter me with orisons, for then

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I am in heaven for him; or ere I could

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Give him that parting kiss which I had set

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Betwixt two charming words, comes in my father,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: And like the tyrannous breathing of the north

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Shakes all our buds from growing.

speaker: LADY
text: The Queen, madam,

speaker: LADY
text: Desires your Highness’ company.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Those things I bid you do, get them dispatched.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I will attend the Queen.

speaker: PISANIO
text: Madam, I shall.
